assumptions: - The algorithm iterates through each bit of the multiplier (B). For each bit that is set (1), the multiplicand (A) is added to the product at the corresponding shifted position.

checks.description: Verify that a legal enabled multiply operation eventually produces the exact unsigned product.
notes: Structured pipeline-product relation uses recorded operands and observed completion gating only.
checks.pass_condition: The observable product must equal mul_a * mul_b once the output becomes valid.
checks.trigger_condition: When the rendered stimulus drives legal multiplicand and multiplier values.

checks.description: The product output must equal the unsigned multiplication of A and B for the concrete inputs driven in the basic case.
checks.trigger_condition: When stimulus drives A=1 and B=1 as specified in the basic_001 stimulus program.
